scripts.start: env -u NODE_OPTIONS node scripts/generate-sample-catalog.mjs && env -u NODE_OPTIONS expo start
scripts.start:dev: APP_VARIANT=dev env -u NODE_OPTIONS node scripts/generate-sample-catalog.mjs && env -u NODE_OPTIONS expo start --dev-client
scripts.android: env -u NODE_OPTIONS node scripts/generate-sample-catalog.mjs && env -u NODE_OPTIONS expo start --go --android
scripts.android:native: env -u NODE_OPTIONS node scripts/generate-sample-catalog.mjs && env -u NODE_OPTIONS expo run:android
scripts.android:dev: APP_VARIANT=dev env -u NODE_OPTIONS node scripts/generate-sample-catalog.mjs && env -u NODE_OPTIONS expo run:android
scripts.ios: env -u NODE_OPTIONS node scripts/generate-sample-catalog.mjs && env -u NODE_OPTIONS expo start --go --ios
scripts.ios:native: env -u NODE_OPTIONS node scripts/generate-sample-catalog.mjs && env -u NODE_OPTIONS expo run:ios
scripts.ios:dev: APP_VARIANT=dev env -u NODE_OPTIONS node scripts/generate-sample-catalog.mjs && env -u NODE_OPTIONS expo run:ios
scripts.build:dev:ios: APP_VARIANT=dev env -u NODE_OPTIONS node scripts/generate-sample-catalog.mjs && env -u NODE_OPTIONS expo run:ios
scripts.build:dev:android: APP_VARIANT=dev env -u NODE_OPTIONS node scripts/generate-sample-catalog.mjs && env -u NODE_OPTIONS expo run:android
scripts.web: env -u NODE_OPTIONS node scripts/generate-sample-catalog.mjs && env -u NODE_OPTIONS expo start --web
